This is consistent with the fact that today is June 17, 2026, meaning those matches haven't been played yet. Let me compile my findings now.

Here is my comprehensive research report on **FIFA World Cup 2026 – Match 73 (Round of 32, June 28)**:

---

## FIFA World Cup 2026 — Match 73: Round of 32, June 28

### Match 73 Overview

**Match 73** is the **first match of the Round of 32** (knockout stage) of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. It is scheduled as follows:

| Detail | Information |
|--------|-------------|
| **Match Number** | 73 |
| **Round** | Round of 32 (first knockout round) |
| **Date** | **June 28, 2026** |
| **Kickoff Time** | **12:00 p.m. local time (UTC−7 / 7:00 p.m. UTC)** |
| **Venue** | **SoFi Stadium, Inglewood, California** |
| **Matchup** | **Runner-up Group A vs Runner-up Group B** |

### Teams Involved

The specific teams have **not yet been determined** as of June 17, 2026. Only Matchday 1 results are complete; Matchdays 2 (June 18) and 3 (June 24) have not yet been played. The runners-up of Groups A and B will be decided after all group matches conclude on June 24.

**Group A** teams: Mexico (co-host), South Africa, South Korea, Czech Republic
- Matchday 1 results (June 11): Mexico 2–0 South Africa; South Korea 2–1 Czech Republic
- Remaining: Matchday 2 (June 18) and Matchday 3 (June 24) still to be played

**Group B** teams: Canada (co-host), Bosnia and Herzegovina, Qatar, Switzerland
- Matchday 1 results (June 12-13): Canada 1–1 Bosnia and Herzegovina; Qatar 1–1 Switzerland
- Remaining: Matchday 2 (June 18) and Matchday 3 (June 24) still to be played

### Knockout Stage Path

The winner of Match 73 will advance to the **Round of 16 (Match 90)**, where they will face the **winner of Match 75** (Winner Group F vs Runner-up Group C). That Round of 16 match is scheduled for **July 4 at NRG Stadium, Houston**.

### Full June 28 Round of 32 Schedule

Based on the FIFA match schedule, **Match 73 is the only Round of 32 match scheduled for June 28, 2026**. It is the opening knockout stage match of the entire tournament. The remaining Round of 32 matches run from June 29 through July 3.

### Tournament Format Context

The 2026 FIFA World Cup is the first with **48 teams** (expanded from 32). The group stage features **12 groups of 4 teams**. The top 2 from each group (24 teams) plus the **8 best third-placed teams** advance to an unprecedented **Round of 32** before proceeding to the Round of 16, quarterfinals, semifinals, and final (July 19 at MetLife Stadium, East Rutherford, NJ).

key_facts: Match 73 is the first Round of 32 match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, scheduled for June 28, 2026 at 12:00 p.m. local time (UTC-7 / 7:00 p.m. UTC).
Match 73 is Runner-up Group A vs Runner-up Group B, to be played at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California.
The specific teams have not yet been determined as of June 17, 2026 — group stage Matchdays 2 and 3 (June 18 and 24) remain to be played.
Group A contains Mexico (co-host), South Africa, South Korea, and Czech Republic. Matchday 1 results: Mexico 2-0 South Africa; South Korea 2-1 Czech Republic.
Group B contains Canada (co-host), Bosnia and Herzegovina, Qatar, and Switzerland. Matchday 1 results: Canada 1-1 Bosnia and Herzegovina; Qatar 1-1 Switzerland.
Match 73 is the only Round of 32 match scheduled for June 28 — it opens the knockout stage of the tournament.
The winner of Match 73 advances to Round of 16 Match 90 on July 4 at NRG Stadium, Houston, to face the winner of Match 75 (Winner Group F vs Runner-up Group C).
The 2026 World Cup is the first with 48 teams, introducing a Round of 32 as a new knockout round between the group stage and Round of 16.
The knockout stage runs from June 28 to July 19, with the final at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
